name: Ren Kurogane
description: A former underground fighter who treats cursed energy as an afterthought. Ren closes distance, breaks guards, and ends exchanges with overwhelming physical force.

name: Mina Ishikawa
description: Mina absorbs pressure without losing composure. Her fighting style turns patient guarding into an advantage, punishing opponents only once they have exhausted themselves against her defense.

name: Sora Aizawa
description: Lacking an inherited technique, Sora has spent every training session refining raw cursed energy. They are vulnerable in prolonged close combat, but their output and control make every opening dangerous.
